name: Election Announcement
purpose: Officially starts the election process and publishes key dates.
typicalDuration: 1–3 days (announcement), followed by a multi-week schedule
citizenActions: Note important dates for your region
Check voter registration and correction windows

name: Voter Registration / Correction Window
purpose: Allows eligible citizens to register and existing voters to update details.
citizenActions: Register if you are not on the voter list
Request corrections (name, address, age) if needed
reminders: Do not wait for the final day
Keep copies of your submission and documents

name: Candidate Nomination Filing
purpose: Candidates submit nominations to participate in the election.
citizenActions: Focus on verifying your voter details and polling station
Watch for publication of final candidate lists
reminders: Ignore unofficial claims about candidates or rules
Final lists are published after scrutiny in many systems

name: Nomination Scrutiny
purpose: Election authorities verify nominations and publish accepted candidates.
citizenActions: Confirm you know your polling station and documents

name: Campaign Period
purpose: Time when candidates/campaigns communicate with voters (rules vary).
citizenActions: Avoid misinformation by using trusted sources for voting procedure
reminders: This app is educational and neutral; follow official procedure guidance
If rules include a quiet period, follow local instructions

name: Polling Day
purpose: Eligible registered voters cast their ballots at assigned polling stations.
typicalDuration: 1 day (sometimes multiple days depending on the election)
citizenActions: Follow staff instructions and cast your vote carefully
reminders: You usually must vote at your assigned station
If you face issues, ask polling staff for guidance

name: Vote Counting
purpose: Votes are counted and results are tabulated under official procedures.
typicalDuration: Several hours to multiple days (varies widely)
reminders: Be cautious about unverified early result posts

name: Results Declaration
typicalDuration: Same day to several days after counting (varies)
reminders: Prefer election authority announcements over screenshots
Understand differences between preliminary and final results
